name: dose-checklist
title: Dose Checklist
description: Day checklist of scheduled medication doses with taken-state and an adherence progress header.

props.name: onToggle
props.description: Called when a dose is checked/unchecked; state is controlled by the caller.

props.name: hideProgress
props.description: Hide the "n of m taken" header and bar.

clinicalNotes: Taken-state is caller-controlled — the component records intent, it is not a medication-administration record (MAR) and must not be used as the source of truth for administration. Checked items remain readable (strikethrough + reduced opacity, not hidden). Times are display-only strings; timezone handling belongs to the caller.
notes: Ported from petals_ui unchanged apart from import paths.
